notes: v1.3.71 fixes a reasoning/content routing gap on the non-stream response path for Qwen 3.6, Gemma 4, MiniMax, and Nemotron Cascade. Reasoning prose that streaming correctly routed to reasoning_content was being misrouted to content for non-stream requests. Root cause: Qwen3 parser short-circuited no-tags case, Gemma 4 channel markers stripped by clean_output_text before parser saw them. Fix: extract_reasoning Case 4a + GenerationOutput.raw_text + Anthropic /v1/messages wire-spec default. Live-verified 5 families × 12 scenarios = 58 clean. 23 new pytest regression guards + 2645/8 full pytest (same pre-existing fails as 1.3.70). Panel vitest 1577/1577.
